# Proposal for Loopcatch

### 1. Opening

You set the bar on the call: "last agency we used, six months in, we'd spent £40k and had nothing to show for it." You also said the content they produced "would never have written ourselves." This proposal is built around the opposite — we don't write as you until we've read fifty of your things first, and you review every voice profile output before anything ships. Everything else in here rests on that.

### 2. Their situation

- £400k ARR B2B SaaS, team of 7, growing but slower than you want
- Content production is you at midnight — unsustainable, and inconsistent output
- Outbound sales currently run by you personally after a failed SDR hire in January
- 2–3 accounts per quarter lost to usage drop-off (not churn, "fade-away")
- Previous agency engagement cost £40k over 6 months with no attributable output

### 3. Our approach

We're proposing three distinct shapes because on the call you named four concerns with roughly equal weight — content, outbound, customer success, hiring — and the right engagement shape depends on which you actually want moved in Q2 vs which can wait.

Every shape starts the same way in Week 1: we ingest fifty of your written things (emails, Slack messages you've posted publicly, LinkedIn, blog drafts) and produce a voice profile you approve or reject. Nothing gets written in your name until that profile is signed off. This is the specific failure mode you described with the last agency, and it's the first thing we do.

### 4. Scope

#### Starter — Content-led (£1,500/month + £5,000 setup)
- Voice profile extraction and ongoing tuning (Week 1)
- 2 long-form pieces per month, your voice
- Each piece repurposed into 3 social posts, 1 email
- Monthly 30-min review call
- **Excludes:** outbound, customer success, hiring

#### Growth — Content + Outbound (£3,500/month + £12,000 setup)  *(recommended)*
- Everything in Starter, plus:
- Outbound Pilot: AI-drafted, human-reviewed outbound sequences replacing your manual outbound
- Lead enrichment via Companies House + Prospeo (UK-compliant, GDPR-safe)
- Monthly outbound reporting (booked meetings, reply rate, sequence-level performance)
- Weekly 30-min call for the first 8 weeks

#### Scale — Full stack (£6,500/month + £18,000 setup)
- Everything in Growth, plus:
- Customer Success Watchdog: usage-drop detection, automated re-engagement sequences, CS team briefing when an account shows fade signals
- Quarterly strategy session with your team
- **Explicitly excluded from every tier:** the candidate screening workstream you mentioned — that falls outside our service catalogue for SaaS clients under £1M ARR. Worth revisiting in Q3 if Loopcatch has grown past that threshold.

### 5. Timeline

| Milestone | Week | Deliverable |
|---|---|---|
| Kickoff | Week 0 | Signed agreement, kickoff call with you + Chris, access to your content archives |
| Voice profile v1 | Week 1 | Draft voice profile with example drafts for your review |
| Voice profile signed off | Week 2 | Approved voice profile, banned-phrases list locked |
| First content piece (all tiers) | Week 3 | Long-form piece in your voice, your final edit |
| Outbound sequence live (Growth+) | Week 4 | First outbound sequence running, you approve every message before send for the first 2 weeks |
| CS watchdog live (Scale only) | Week 6 | Usage-drop detection running, first CS team brief delivered |
| Voice drift check | Week 8 | You re-review recent outputs against the voice profile; we tune |
| First monthly review | Week 5, then monthly | What we produced, what performed, what changes for next month |

### 6. Investment

**Starter — Content-led.** £1,500/month + £5,000 setup (ex. VAT). 50% setup on signature, 50% on kickoff call. Monthly retainer billed on the 1st, rolling monthly with 30 days' notice.

**Growth — Content + Outbound.** £3,500/month + £12,000 setup (ex. VAT). *Recommended for where you described your priorities.* Same payment structure.

**Scale — Full stack.** £6,500/month + £18,000 setup (ex. VAT). Same payment structure. Quarterly retainer discount (5%) available if you want to lock in a 6-month commitment.

All three tiers sit within the £5–15k/month range you indicated. The Scale tier's total monthly cost (including amortised setup over 12 months) lands at £8k/month — inside your upper bound but not close to it.

### 7. Next step

Reply by Thursday, April 22 with which shape matches where your head is. I'll have the contract in your inbox within 24 hours of your reply, and we kick off the following Monday. Voice profile delivered in Week 1 — you'll know in 7 days whether we actually get you on the page.

If you want a 30-minute call with Chris before you decide, [Calendly link] — I'll join.

### 8. About us

Acme Agency works exclusively with UK B2B SaaS between £200k and £3M ARR. Every engagement starts with voice profile extraction because every previous client who'd worked with an agency before had the same story you had — generic content, wrong tone, no attribution.

**Relevant case study — Rye Signals, £600k ARR B2B SaaS, Glasgow:** joined on the Growth tier 10 months ago. Before us: founder writing content at midnight, no outbound motion, 14 inbound MQLs/month. After 6 months: founder writing zero content (all on voice-matched library), outbound producing 22 booked meetings/month, inbound MQLs at 38/month driven by content discoverability. They're still on Growth — haven't needed to escalate.
